pi_items.source: Verified through APK string analysis and source code inspection. Actual preference key is 'AutoShowAirportDiagram' which matches the regex pattern. GitHub source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/apps4av/avare/master/app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml

Verified through task requirements and verifier.py logic. When the 'Auto Show Airport Diagram' feature is enabled, the boolean preference value is set to 'true'. Confirmed in verifier.py:85-86 and setup_task.sh lines 22-26.

Verified through multiple sources: (1) Google Play Store listing: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.ds.avare, (2) F-Droid repository: https://f-droid.org/en/packages/com.ds.avare/, (3) APK analysis showing consistent package name in extracted manifest and string resources. The app is Avare Aviation GPS, a real open-source aviation navigation app with 100,000+ installations.

Verified through Android documentation and standard SharedPreferences file location format. This follows the standard pattern: /data/data/{package_name}/shared_prefs/{package_name}_preferences.xml. Confirmed in Android Developer documentation: https://developer.android.com/training/data-storage/shared-preferences and verified in task scripts setup_task.sh:6 and export_result.sh:6.

privileged_info_summary: The task targets the Avare Aviation GPS app (package: com.ds.avare, available on Google Play Store with 100,000+ installations). The preference to enable is 'AutoShowAirportDiagram' which stores a boolean value in the SharedPreferences XML file at /data/data/com.ds.avare/shared_prefs/com.ds.avare_preferences.xml. When enabled, this setting automatically displays airport diagrams during landing rollout. The target value when enabled is 'true'. All metadata claims have been independently verified against the actual APK, source code, and Android documentation.
